---
title: 'You are coming to town...'
date: '2014-02-01T05:01:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Azarea Anne Wolfe - Journal'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3936793548951483051'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/you-are-coming-to-town.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Azarea Anne Wolfe - Journal/feed.atom'
---

<p>Azey, I think that's what I'll call you. You haven't been born yet. Actually, not to gross you out too much, I don't THINK you've been conceived yet...</p>
<p>We thought you were coming in 2005 but that turned out to be Connor, much to everyone's surprise! You'd better thank him often, because he got the worst of me. I didn't become a very good Dad until later... I'm still not great, but that's part of why I'm writing this. </p>
<p>I want you to know your Mom and I have been expecting you for years. We still have baby clothes from 2005, unopened.</p>
<p>You may have a twin. That's been on your mom's heart for a while.</p>
<p>I'll write more later. I love you<br>
 Your Daddy, Darrell<br></p>
